title: Guest invitations
excerpt:
Hello, 
I want to invite our client to see the full finance report for his construction project. We use Monday projects, and I haven’t figured out how to invite someone as a guest or only let them see one dashboard/board…

posts.author: Sabu98 (Sandra Bustamante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I want to invite our client to see the full finance report for his construction project. We use Monday projects, and I haven’t figured out how to invite someone as a guest or only let them see one dashboard/board. Is there a way to do it?

thanks

posts.author: Kenneth_Alfaro (Kenneth Alfaro Álvarez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hola!

En el caso de los tableros, debe cambiar a tablero compartible. (A partir de la licencia Standard)
Luego debe invitarlo como invitado.

En el caso de los paneles también debe compartirle el mismo.

posts.author: Kristinemd13 (Kristine Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
